megapixels.description: Target resolution in megapixels (1-8). Output is capped at 8 MP.
megapixels.title: Megapixels

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output image (0-100). Not relevant for PNG.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

enhance_details.description: Enhance fine textures and small details. May increase contrast and introduce minor deviations.
enhance_details.title: Enhance Details

enhance_realism.description: Improve realism. May deviate more from the original. Recommended for AI-generated images.
enhance_realism.title: Enhance Realism

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker
